  "@type": "JobPosting",
  "title": "Office Assistant",
  "description": "Updeal Resources, a professional service company, is recruiting suitably qualified candidates to fill the position below:

Job Position: Office Assistant

Job Location: Yaba, Lagos
Employment Type: Full-time

Job Summary&nbsp;


	The Office Assistant is responsible for providing administrative and clerical support to ensure the smooth day-to-day operations of the office.
	The ideal candidate will be organized, detail-oriented, professional, and capable of handling multiple tasks efficiently.


Key Responsibilities


	Maintain a clean, organized, and efficient office environment.
	Receive and attend to visitors in a professional and courteous manner.
	Manage incoming and outgoing correspondence, including emails, letters, and phone calls.
	Handle filing, record-keeping, and document management.
	Assist with photocopying, scanning, printing, and other administrative tasks.
	Monitor and replenish office supplies and stationery when required.
	Support scheduling of meetings, appointments, and office activities.
	Distribute documents and information to relevant departments and staff.
	Maintain confidentiality of company information and records.
	Assist management and other departments with administrative duties as assigned.
	Ensure office equipment is properly maintained and report any faults promptly.


Requirements


	Minimum of SSCE, OND, or equivalent qualification.
	Previous experience in an administrative or office support role is an added advantage.
	Good communication and interpersonal skills.
	Basic computer proficiency, including Microsoft Office applications.
	Strong organizational and time-management skills.
	Ability to multitask and work with minimal supervision.
	Professional appearance and positive attitude.
	High level of integrity and attention to detail.


Work Schedule


	Monday to Saturday.


Note: The successful candidate must be proactive, dependable, and committed to supporting efficient office operations.",

Office Assistant Job at Updeal Resources




        
    

        
        Updeal Resources, a professional service company, is recruiting suitably qualified candidates to fill the position below:

Job Position: Office Assistant

Job Location: Yaba, Lagos
Employment Type: Full-time

Job Summary 


	The Office Assistant is responsible for providing administrative and clerical support to ensure the smooth day-to-day operations of the office.
	The ideal candidate will be organized, detail-oriented, professional, and capable of handling multiple tasks efficiently.


Key Responsibilities
     

        



     (adsbygoogle = window.adsbygoogle || []).push({});
    
    




	Maintain a clean, organized, and efficient office environment.
	Receive and attend to visitors in a professional and courteous manner.
	Manage incoming and outgoing correspondence, including emails, letters, and phone calls.
	Handle filing, record-keeping, and document management.
	Assist with photocopying, scanning, printing, and other administrative tasks.
	Monitor and replenish office supplies and stationery when required.
	Support scheduling of meetings, appointments, and office activities.
	Distribute documents and information to relevant departments and staff.
	Maintain confidentiality of company information and records.
	Assist management and other departments with administrative duties as assigned.
	Ensure office equipment is properly maintained and report any faults promptly.


Requirements


	Minimum of SSCE, OND, or equivalent qualification.
	Previous experience in an administrative or office support role is an added advantage.
	Good communication and interpersonal skills.
	Basic computer proficiency, including Microsoft Office applications.
	Strong organizational and time-management skills.
	Ability to multitask and work with minimal supervision.
	Professional appearance and positive attitude.
	High level of integrity and attention to detail.


Work Schedule


	Monday to Saturday.


Note: The successful candidate must be proactive, dependable, and committed to supporting efficient office operations.    

    

        Click here to Apply

{
  "@context": "https://schema.org",
  "@type": "JobPosting",
  "title": "Service Manager, Earthmoving & Mining",
  "description": "Liebherr Group today is a leading manufacturer of construction and mining equipment established in 1949 , but also supplies innovative user-oriented products and services in many other fields. The family-owned enterprise employs 46,000 people in over 135 companies worldwide.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Service Manager, Earthmoving &amp; Mining

Job ID: 82308
Job Location: Abuja (FCT)

Job Summary


	We are looking for an experienced Service Manager Earthmoving &amp; Mining to lead aftersales service operations for Earthmoving &amp; Mining equipment in Nigeria.
	You will be responsible for delivering high-quality service, maximizing equipment uptime, and driving customer satisfaction and service business growth.


Responsibilities


	Service Operations: Manage all field and workshop activities, ensuring safe, timely and high-quality execution
	Customer Support: Serve as the main customer contact and resolve issues efficiently
	Leadership: Lead, coach and monitor service teams
	Technical Support: Guide to troubleshooting and major repairs
	Parts &amp; Planning: Ensure parts availability and optimize service planning
	Warranty &amp; Quality: Oversee warranty handling and continuous improvement
	Business Growth: Identify opportunities to increase service revenue and warranty recovery
	Cost &amp; Reporting: Control costs and track performance against KPIs
	Compliance &amp; Safety: Ensure adherence to standards and HSE practices


Requirements


	Bachelor&rsquo;s Degree in mechanical, electrical or related engineering field
	7&ndash;10 years of experience in heavy equipment service (mining/earthmoving preferred)
	Proven experience managing efficient, well-performing service teams and operations
	High customer satisfaction orientation and
	Strong technical knowledge (hydraulics, engines, electrical systems)
	Experience with Liebherr equipment is an advantage
	Fluent in English
	Willingness to travel frequently within Nigeria.

Service Manager, Earthmoving & Mining Job at Liebherr Group




        
    

        
        Liebherr Group today is a leading manufacturer of construction and mining equipment established in 1949 , but also supplies innovative user-oriented products and services in many other fields. The family-owned enterprise employs 46,000 people in over 135 companies worldwide.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Service Manager, Earthmoving & Mining

Job ID: 82308
Job Location: Abuja (FCT)

Job Summary
     

        



     (adsbygoogle = window.adsbygoogle || []).push({});
    
    




	We are looking for an experienced Service Manager Earthmoving & Mining to lead aftersales service operations for Earthmoving & Mining equipment in Nigeria.
	You will be responsible for delivering high-quality service, maximizing equipment uptime, and driving customer satisfaction and service business growth.


Responsibilities


	Service Operations: Manage all field and workshop activities, ensuring safe, timely and high-quality execution
	Customer Support: Serve as the main customer contact and resolve issues efficiently
	Leadership: Lead, coach and monitor service teams
	Technical Support: Guide to troubleshooting and major repairs
	Parts & Planning: Ensure parts availability and optimize service planning
	Warranty & Quality: Oversee warranty handling and continuous improvement
	Business Growth: Identify opportunities to increase service revenue and warranty recovery
	Cost & Reporting: Control costs and track performance against KPIs
	Compliance & Safety: Ensure adherence to standards and HSE practices


Requirements


	Bachelor’s Degree in mechanical, electrical or related engineering field
	7–10 years of experience in heavy equipment service (mining/earthmoving preferred)
	Proven experience managing efficient, well-performing service teams and operations
	High customer satisfaction orientation and
	Strong technical knowledge (hydraulics, engines, electrical systems)
	Experience with Liebherr equipment is an advantage
	Fluent in English
	Willingness to travel frequently within Nigeria.
    

    

        Click here to Apply

  "title": "Information Technology (IT) Teacher",
  "description": "Glowfield International School is an ingenious school that provides your child with a world-class educational experience.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Information Technology (IT) Teacher

Job Location: Lekki, Lagos
Employment Type: Full-time

Job Summary


	Glowfield International School is seeking a qualified, passionate and innovative Information Technology (IT) Teacher to join our academic team.


Responsibilities


	Deliver engaging and effective IT/Computer Science lessons.
	Integrate modern technology and innovative teaching strategies into classroom instruction.
	Assess, monitor and report students academic progress.
	Participate in school activities and contribute to the achievement of the school&#39;s educational goals.


Requirements
Applicants must:


	Possess a Degree in Computer Science or a related field.
	Demonstrate strong 21st-century teaching and technology skills.
	Have relevant teaching experience in a reputable educational institution.
	Possess excellent communication, classroom management and interpersonal skills.
	Be passionate about student development and academic excellence.


Method of Application&nbsp;
Interested and qualified candidates should send their CV to: hr@glowfieldschool.com using &quot;IT Teacher&quot; as the subject of the email.",

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Information Technology (IT) Teacher

Job Location: Lekki, Lagos
Employment Type: Full-time

Job Summary


	Glowfield International School is seeking a qualified, passionate and innovative Information Technology (IT) Teacher to join our academic team.


Responsibilities

	Deliver engaging and effective IT/Computer Science lessons.

  "title": "Architect",
  "description": "RevolutionPlus Property the leading real estate company in Nigeria with a vision to be the foremost real estate company in Sub-Saharan Africa as well as the world. We have been in business for over 11 years and we have 7 branches within and outside Nigeria. We pride ourselves in excellence, integrity and timely delivery. We strongly believe that our employees are our best asset and as such we take very good care of their careers and life while with us.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Architect

Job Location: Lagos&nbsp;
Employment Type: Full-time

The Position


	We are looking for an architect to churn out Creative designs for new construction projects by using specialist construction knowledge and high-level drawing skills to design buildings that are functional, safe, sustainable and aesthetically pleasing


Job Description


	Preparing drawings, blueprints, specifications and construction documents.
	Developing and presenting design proposals, preparing drawings to company specifications.
	Working with other related professionals, such as engineers, urban planners, landscape architects, construction representatives and interior designers to ensure excellent delivery of Jobs.
	Presentation of Final construction plans that would be used in building.
	Ability to work with computer-aided drafting systems as well as other relevant technologies being used.
	Ensuring that a building&rsquo;s style is safe and sustainable to ensure it meets the needs of its occupants as well as the requirements of state and federal regulator


Job Requirements


	Minimum of Bachelor&rsquo;s Degree in Architecture from a reputable University.
	Must have had 1-3 years of post NYSC Experience or more, in same field
	Prior Experience working with real estate companies will be an added advantage.


Method of Application
Interested and qualified candidates should send their Resume to: hr@revolutionplusproperty.com using &quot;Architect&quot; as the subject of the email.

Note: Do not apply for this role if you do not have the above stated requirements.",

Architect Job at Revolutionplus Property Development Company Limited




        
    

        
        RevolutionPlus Property the leading real estate company in Nigeria with a vision to be the foremost real estate company in Sub-Saharan Africa as well as the world. We have been in business for over 11 years and we have 7 branches within and outside Nigeria. We pride ourselves in excellence, integrity and timely delivery. We strongly believe that our employees are our best asset and as such we take very good care of their careers and life while with us.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Architect

Job Location: Lagos 
Employment Type: Full-time

The Position
     

        



     (adsbygoogle = window.adsbygoogle || []).push({});
    
    




	We are looking for an architect to churn out Creative designs for new construction projects by using specialist construction knowledge and high-level drawing skills to design buildings that are functional, safe, sustainable and aesthetically pleasing


Job Description


	Preparing drawings, blueprints, specifications and construction documents.
	Developing and presenting design proposals, preparing drawings to company specifications.
	Working with other related professionals, such as engineers, urban planners, landscape architects, construction representatives and interior designers to ensure excellent delivery of Jobs.
	Presentation of Final construction plans that would be used in building.
	Ability to work with computer-aided drafting systems as well as other relevant technologies being used.
	Ensuring that a building’s style is safe and sustainable to ensure it meets the needs of its occupants as well as the requirements of state and federal regulator


Job Requirements


	Minimum of Bachelor’s Degree in Architecture from a reputable University.
	Must have had 1-3 years of post NYSC Experience or more, in same field
	Prior Experience working with real estate companies will be an added advantage.


Method of Application
Interested and qualified candidates should send their Resume to: [email protected] using "Architect" as the subject of the email.

Note: Do not apply for this role if you do not have the above stated requirements.    

    

        Click here to Apply
